entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop analyzed for seed system performance in Niger and Senegal

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop analyzed for seed system performance in Niger and Senegal

entities.name: NIGER
entities.description: A West African country where seed system performance was assessed

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: A West African country where seed system performance was assessed

entities.name: SEED SUPPLY SYSTEMS
entities.description: The mechanisms through which seeds are produced and distributed to farmers

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed for better yield or resilience

entities.name: FORMAL SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: Official seed supply channels involving government or private companies

entities.name: INFORMAL SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: Unofficial seed exchange networks among farmers

entities.name: SEED DISTRIBUTION NETWORK
entities.description: The system of channels used to deliver seeds to the end user

entities.name: INPUT-OUTPUT MARKET INTEGRATION
entities.description: The coordination between the market for agricultural inputs and the market for the resulting produce

entities.name: CREDIT AND TRADE CONTRACTS
entities.description: Financial and commercial agreements that facilitate the acquisition of inputs and sale of outputs

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A climatic condition of water scarcity that impacts seed availability and flow

entities.name: PRODUCT MARKETS
entities.description: Markets where farmers sell their harvested crops

entities.name: TARGETED SUBSIDY
entities.description: Financial assistance provided to specific groups to increase access to improved seeds

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers operating on a small scale who are the primary targets of seed systems

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: WEST AND CENTRAL AFRICA
entities.description: The geographic region where seed supply systems were found to function poorly
